title: Add stall/owner photo to About section and restyle section heading

requirements.text: In the About/Our Story section of frontend/src/components/About.tsx, add a full-width or prominently placed photo of the coffee stall with the owner. The image should be rendered using the generated static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/coffee-craft-stall-owner.dim_1200x800.png. Style it with rounded corners, a subtle warm brown/gold border or shadow consistent with the luxury brown palette, and generous whitespace around it. Place the image below the introductory text and above (or beside) the stats grid.

quotes: add on random photo of stall with owner under our story

acceptanceCriteria: The stall/owner photo is visible in the About/Our Story section
The image uses the generated asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/
The image has rounded corners and a subtle warm brown/gold decorative border or drop shadow
The image is responsive and does not overflow on mobile viewports
Generous whitespace surrounds the image, preserving the luxury aesthetic

requirements.text: Restyle the 'Our Story' (or 'About Us') section heading in frontend/src/components/About.tsx to have a luxurious, high-end typographic treatment. Apply a layered CSS text-shadow using warm brown/gold tones (e.g., #C8A882, #A0522D, #6B3F1F) to give the Playfair Display heading a raised, embossed 3D appearance — similar in style to the 'COFFEE CRAFT' hero heading. Optionally add a thin decorative gold rule or ornamental flourish beneath the heading for extra opulence.

quotes: on the top where coffe craft written....change it in a luxury stylish type

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Our Story' heading in the About section uses Playfair Display font
The heading has a multi-layer text-shadow using warm brown/gold tones creating a 3D or embossed effect
The visual style feels premium and consistent with the overall luxury brown/cream palette
A decorative gold rule or ornamental element is present beneath or near the heading
The heading is clearly legible against the warm cream background

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Maintain the existing warm brown/cream luxury color palette — do not introduce new unrelated colors
All new image assets must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated as static files
nonGoals: Do not add a real-time photo upload feature or backend image storage
Do not change the layout or content of any other section (Hero, Location, Contact, Footer, Navbar)
Do not alter the existing floating social icons or navbar logo

required: Warm, inviting photograph-style illustration of a small premium coffee stall with a young male owner standing proudly beside it, warm ambient lighting, rich brown wooden counter, coffee equipment visible, luxurious and approachable atmosphere (coffee-craft-stall-owner.dim_1200x800.png)
